title: Iran war: What's happening on day 63 as Trump signals possible attacks
snippet: Day 63 overview. Trump: 'might need' to restart war. Air defenses activated in Tehran. Pezeshkian: siege 'intolerable.' 1,701 civilians killed (254 children). Hormuz traffic at 5% of pre-war average. Trump may pull troops from Italy/Spain.
tag_reason: CENTCOM 브리핑(4/30) 후속 — 트럼프 '공격 재개 필요' 시그널 및 Day 63 종합
